title: GodlyOptimized
description: A lightweight, performance-optimized Minecraft modpack designed to boost FPS, reduce lag, and deliver a smooth vanilla-friendly experience—ideal for PvP, survival, and low-end PCs.
body:
🔥 About GodlyOptimized

GodlyOptimized is a carefully curated, hard-tested performance modpack built to push Minecraft’s FPS to its limits without breaking the vanilla feel.

This pack focuses on real optimization, not gimmicks — using proven mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, Krypton, Dynamic FPS, and other lightweight enhancements to deliver:

🚀 Massive FPS boost

🧠 Lower RAM & CPU usage

🎯 Smoother PvP & combat

⚡ Faster world loading & chunk rendering

🖥️ Stable performance on low-end to mid-range PCs

No unnecessary visuals.
No gameplay-breaking tweaks.
Just pure performance and stability.

⚙️ What makes this pack different?

✔ Carefully selected mods — no bloat
✔ Clean configs tuned for real gameplay, not benchmarks
✔ Works perfectly for PvP, Survival, and Daily Minecraft
✔ Compatible with shaders via Iris (optional)
✔ Vanilla-friendly look with modern smoothness

Whether you’re fighting on servers, grinding survival, or just tired of lag — GodlyOptimized gets the job done.

💻 Recommended For

Low-end & mid-range PCs

Laptop players

PvP / Competitive Minecraft

Players who want OptiFine-level smoothness without OptiFine

⚠️ Note

This is a client-side optimization pack.
It does not add content or change core mechanics — only performance and quality-of-life improvements.
